calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-12-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to May-14-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

***After hearing a dismissal of the complaint was filed by plaintiff. Per Judge Wong, the OSC may be taken off calendar; dismissal on file.***

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-08-2018 Continued To Mar-12-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. For good cause, the court did not impose sanctions on plaintiff's counsel for failure to appear. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to MAR-12-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: NEWTON LAM; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-07-2018 Set For Order To Show Cause On Nov-06-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
